decision.summary: Keep the weekly 74k reach position unchanged and open the April 10 BTC 73k reach market.
decision.rationale: The live weekly `will-bitcoin-reach-74k-april-6-12` Yes position is far below take-profit and early-stage rules disable stop-loss, so no existing position needs closing or reduction. The latest 2026-04-09 Beecthor transcript and summary still favor a final upside sweep toward 73.8k-74k before larger bearish continuation, and Binance at 72138.0 with positive 24h momentum keeps that short-term bullish thesis intact. Under nearest-strike-first, the closest upside target above spot is the April 10 73k reach market, and its 53.5% probability sits cleanly inside the preferred entry range.

validation.message: Maximum number of open positions reached

details.rejected: Maximum number of open positions reached
